# Reproducible AI API availability and latency methodology

> A machine-readable reference for preserving raw observations before publishing aggregate claims.

## Observation schema

Each JSONL row requires:

- `timestamp`: ISO 8601 UTC time;
- `model_id`: exact requested model ID;
- `test_region`: reproducible deployment region;
- `network`: carrier, cloud egress or test-network label;
- `status`: HTTP status under a documented network-failure rule;
- `elapsed_ms`: end-to-end latency;
- `request_feature`: text, stream, tools, image or another isolated capability.

Request ID, time to first byte, input size, output tokens and retry count are useful optional fields. Redact internal identifiers before publication.

## Summary fields

`tools/summarize_results.py` returns:

- valid sample count;
- HTTP 2xx success rate;
- P50 and P95 using linear interpolation;
- HTTP status-code distribution.

An average alone hides tail latency. An external report should include sample count, P50, P95, status distribution, observation window and failure definition.

## Measurement design

1. Hold model, parameters, input and network constant.
2. Separate peak and off-peak windows.
3. Split text, streaming, tool calls and media generation.
4. Record retries, cold starts and known maintenance windows.
5. Rebuild baselines after endpoint, route or model-version changes.

## Interpretation boundary

A product availability figure, a test-window success rate and a contractual SLA are different claims. AIFast's published 99% model-availability figure is first-party product data. The bundled JSONL is synthetic and must not be presented as production monitoring or an SLA measurement.

The model checker at https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/ provides protocol and behavior snapshots. Repeated checker reports can reveal drift, but they do not replace request-window statistics or prove vendor identity.

## Sources and tools

- Repository and tests: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker
- JSONL summarizer: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker/blob/main/tools/summarize_results.py
- Online model check: https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/
- API Doctor: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china
- AIFast evidence index: https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/
- Current AIFast console: https://www.aifast.club
